chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-513 of 2022 (Liaquat Ali Bhutto Vs. SHO PS Reti) For hearing of main case. 25-10-2023. Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG for the State. >>>>>>>...<<<<<<<< It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that on statement made by DSP Complaint Cell Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo that SHO PS Reti has been directed to record FIR of the applicant, his application u/s 22 A/B Cr.P.C was disposed of by learned Additional Sessions Judge/MCTC/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Ubauro vide order dated 05-09-2022; the FIR of the applicant is not being recorded by the said SHO for one or other reason; therefore the applicant has approached this Court for the needful; however, the applicant would be satisfied, if he is permitted to approach learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace for issuance of appropriate direction against the said SHO for recording his FIR, in terms of statement made by DSP Complaint Cell Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo, which is not opposed by learned DPG for the State. Order accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A. 2
